The '''Kaldani Spires Residential Apartments''' was an exclusive apartment building towering over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Monument Plaza/Legends|Monument Plaza]]. It was owned by the [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeetan]] [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] financier and [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Hego Damask]], who maintained a [[Darth Plagueis' apartment/Legends|private residence]] in the building's summit.

The building was constructed in the style of [[Hasennan Period architecture]]. In the twilight of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], the building, while not as tall or grand as [[500 Republica/Legends|500 Republica]], was [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City's]] most desired address outside the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]]. At the time of his death in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Hath Monchar]] owned a suite on its 500th floor. [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] [[Force lightning/Legends|killed]] his [[Sith Master/Legends|master]], Darth Plagueis, in the Kaldani Spires penthouse.<ref name="Darth P">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>
